title: Onboarding - Welcome to Poly Studio - Fresh install
scenario: Fresh install onboarding: User reaches "Organized" screen, sees "Welcome to Poly Studio" overlay, taps "Get Started" and returns to continue onboarding.
steps: Install and launch the app for the first time.
Go through the onboarding flow until reaching the "Organized" screen.
Observe that a "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears.
Tap "Get Started" on the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen.
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen closes and the user is returned to the "Organized" screen to continue onboarding.
